summary.en: Industrial batteries (≥2 kWh) and EV batteries must carry a carbon footprint declaration (CFD) per lifecycle stage, calculated per harmonised methodology. EV battery CFD mandatory from 18 February 2025; industrial batteries (≥2 kWh, including BESS) from 18 February 2026 (dates confirmed by delegated acts adopted April 2024).
summary.zh: 工业电池（≥2 kWh）及电动汽车电池须按生命周期阶段申报碳足迹（CFD），并依据统一方法计算。电动汽车电池CFD强制日期为2025年2月18日；工业电池（≥2 kWh，含BESS）为2026年2月18日（日期已由2024年4月通过的授权法规确认）。
summary.zht: 工業電池（≥2 kWh）及電動車電池須按生命週期階段申報碳足跡（CFD），並依據統一方法計算。電動車電池CFD強制日期為2025年2月18日；工業電池（≥2 kWh，含BESS）為2026年2月18日（日期已由2024年4月通過的授權法規確認）。

standards_or_laws: Delegated acts to be adopted by European Commission [UNVERIFIED — not yet published as of 2026-06-11]

summary.en: No mandatory equivalent. China has voluntary product carbon footprint standards (GB/T 24067, aligned with ISO 14067) and pilot carbon labelling schemes in some provinces, but no binding CFD obligation for batteries.
summary.zh: 无强制对等规定。中国有自愿性产品碳足迹标准（GB/T 24067，与ISO 14067对应）及部分省份试点碳标签计划，但对电池无具有约束力的CFD义务。
summary.zht: 無強制對等規定。中國有自願性產品碳足跡標準（GB/T 24067，與ISO 14067對應）及部分省份試點碳標籤計劃，但對電池無具有約束力的CFD義務。

standards_or_laws: No binding CN battery-specific CFD regulation as of 2026-06-11

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers have no domestic obligation to calculate or declare battery carbon footprints. Establishing lifecycle GHG inventory, third-party verification, and EU-aligned reporting systems represents a significant new compliance burden.
gap.zh: 中国制造商在国内没有义务计算或申报电池碳足迹。建立生命周期温室气体清单、第三方核查及符合欧盟要求的报告体系，将带来重大新合规负担。
gap.zht: 中國製造商在國內沒有義務計算或申報電池碳足跡。建立生命週期溫室氣體清單、第三方核查及符合歐盟要求的報告體系，將帶來重大新合規負擔。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU) — EV batteries from 18 February 2025; industrial batteries ≥2 kWh (incl. BESS) from 18 February 2026

source.publisher: Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: High gap. No Chinese domestic rule mirrors this obligation. Exporters targeting EU markets must build new CFD capability from scratch.
compliance_verdict.zh: 差距显著。中国国内法规无对应义务。出口欧盟市场的制造商须从零建立碳足迹申报能力。
compliance_verdict.zht: 差距顯著。中國國內法規無對應義務。出口歐盟市場的製造商須從零建立碳足跡申報能力。

requirement_topic.en: CE Marking & Conformity Assessment under EU Battery Regulation
requirement_topic.zh: 欧盟电池法规下的CE标志与合规评估
requirement_topic.zht: 歐盟電池法規下的CE標誌與合規評估

summary.en: Batteries placed on the EU market must bear CE marking demonstrating conformity with all applicable requirements of Regulation (EU) 2023/1542, including safety, performance, labelling, and sustainability. Conformity assessment procedures (internal control or third-party notified body depending on category) must be completed and an EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) issued.
summary.zh: 投放欧盟市场的电池须加贴CE标志，以证明符合法规（EU）2023/1542的全部适用要求，包括安全、性能、标签及可持续性。须完成合规评估程序（视类别采用内部控制或第三方公告机构），并发布欧盟合格声明（DoC）。
summary.zht: 投放歐盟市場的電池須加貼CE標誌，以證明符合法規（EU）2023/1542的全部適用要求，包括安全、性能、標籤及可持續性。須完成合規評估程序（視類別採用內部控制或第三方公告機構），並發佈歐盟合格聲明（DoC）。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2023/1542, Articles 18–24 (CE marking and conformity assessment)

summary.en: China has mandatory CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for certain battery products and GB standards (e.g. GB/T 36276 for lithium-ion batteries for energy storage). However, CCC scope and technical requirements differ substantially from EU Battery Regulation conformity assessment.
summary.zh: 中国对部分电池产品实行强制性CCC认证，并有相关GB标准（如GB/T 36276储能用锂离子电池）。但CCC范围及技术要求与欧盟电池法规合规评估存在重大差异。
summary.zht: 中國對部分電池產品實行強制性CCC認證，並有相關GB標準（如GB/T 36276儲能用鋰離子電池）。但CCC範圍及技術要求與歐盟電池法規合規評估存在重大差異。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 (lithium-ion batteries for electrochemical energy storage)

gap.en: CE marking under the Battery Regulation requires demonstrating conformity with sustainability, carbon footprint, and due-diligence obligations — far beyond a product-safety CCC. Chinese exporters must engage EU notified bodies and maintain technical documentation aligned to the Regulation's expanded scope.
gap.zh: 电池法规下的CE标志要求证明符合可持续性、碳足迹及尽职调查义务，远超产品安全类CCC的范围。中国出口商须委托欧盟公告机构，并维护符合法规扩展范围的技术文件。
gap.zht: 電池法規下的CE標誌要求證明符合可持續性、碳足跡及盡職調查義務，遠超產品安全類CCC的範圍。中國出口商須委託歐盟公告機構，並維護符合法規擴展範圍的技術文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU) — applies to all batteries covered by Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 placed on EU market
mandatory_status.cn: Partial — CCC mandatory for listed categories; GB standards mandatory for grid-connected storage [UNVERIFIED — scope varies]

source.publisher: Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: High gap. CE marking scope under this Regulation is broader than product safety alone; existing CCC does not substitute for EU conformity assessment.
compliance_verdict.zh: 差距显著。本法规下CE标志范围远超产品安全，现有CCC认证不能替代欧盟合规评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: 差距顯著。本法規下CE標誌範圍遠超產品安全，現有CCC認證不能替代歐盟合規評估。

summary.en: Economic operators placing industrial, EV, and SLI batteries (above thresholds) on the EU market must adopt and implement a supply chain due diligence policy covering sourcing of cobalt, natural graphite, lithium, and nickel, including risk identification, mitigation, third-party audits, and public disclosure. Requirements apply to operators with annual turnover above thresholds [UNVERIFIED — exact thresholds set by delegated act].
summary.zh: 将工业、电动汽车及SLI电池（超过门槛值）投放欧盟市场的经营者，须针对钴、天然石墨、锂和镍的采购制定并实施供应链尽职调查政策，包括风险识别、缓解措施、第三方审计及公开披露。适用于年营业额超过门槛值的经营者 [UNVERIFIED — 具体门槛值由授权法规设定]。
summary.zht: 將工業、電動車及SLI電池（超過門檻值）投放歐盟市場的經營者，須針對鈷、天然石墨、鋰和鎳的採購制定並實施供應鏈盡職調查政策，包括風險識別、緩解措施、第三方審計及公開披露。適用於年營業額超過門檻值的經營者 [UNVERIFIED — 具體門檻值由授權法規設定]。

standards_or_laws: OECD Due Diligence Guidance for Responsible Supply Chains of Minerals from Conflict-Affected and High-Risk Areas (referenced in Reg)

summary.en: No mandatory equivalent. China has voluntary responsible sourcing guidelines (e.g. CAAM/CATL voluntary initiatives) and participates in some international initiatives, but no binding domestic law requires battery supply chain due diligence disclosure comparable to Article 48.
summary.zh: 无强制对等规定。中国有自愿性负责任采购指引（如中汽协/宁德时代自愿倡议），也参与部分国际倡议，但国内无具约束力的法律要求电池供应链尽职调查披露，与第48条无可比对等。
summary.zht: 無強制對等規定。中國有自願性負責任採購指引（如中汽協/寧德時代自願倡議），也參與部分國際倡議，但國內無具約束力的法律要求電池供應鏈盡職調查披露，與第48條無可比對等。

standards_or_laws: No binding CN equivalent as of 2026-06-11

gap.en: Chinese battery exporters to the EU must build formal due diligence management systems, conduct third-party audits of upstream mineral suppliers, and publicly disclose findings — obligations with no domestic Chinese parallel. This is a structural compliance gap affecting most mid-size manufacturers.
gap.zh: 中国出口欧盟的电池企业须建立正式尽职调查管理体系，对上游矿产供应商进行第三方审计并公开披露结果——这些义务在中国国内均无对应。这是影响大多数中型制造商的结构性合规缺口。
gap.zht: 中國出口歐盟的電池企業須建立正式盡職調查管理體系，對上游礦產供應商進行第三方審計並公開披露結果——這些義務在中國國內均無對應。這是影響大多數中型製造商的結構性合規缺口。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU) — applies from 18 August 2027 for in-scope operators (postponed from 18 August 2025 by Regulation (EU) 2025/1561, published 30 July 2025)

source.publisher: Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: Critical gap. No Chinese law mirrors this obligation. Exporters must implement OECD-aligned due diligence programs and prepare for third-party audits to access the EU market.
compliance_verdict.zh: 关键差距。中国法律无对应义务。出口商须实施符合OECD标准的尽职调查计划，并为第三方审计做好准备，以进入欧盟市场。
compliance_verdict.zht: 關鍵差距。中國法律無對應義務。出口商須實施符合OECD標準的盡職調查計劃，並為第三方審計做好準備，以進入歐盟市場。

requirement_topic.zh: 标签、二维码与电池护照

summary.en: All batteries must carry prescribed labels (capacity, chemistry, hazard symbols, recycled-content share, QR code). Basic labelling (including separate-collection symbol) mandatory from 18 August 2025; extended labelling requirements (additional Article 13 fields) from 18 August 2026 or 18 months after the relevant implementing act, whichever is later. Industrial batteries ≥2 kWh and EV batteries must also have a digital Battery Passport accessible via QR code, containing lifecycle, carbon footprint, state-of-health, and supply chain data. Battery Passport mandatory from 18 February 2027. Technical data-attribute specifications remain subject to delegated acts not yet adopted as of 2026-06-11.
summary.zh: 所有电池须贴附规定标签（容量、化学体系、危险符号、再生料比例、二维码）。基本标签要求（含分类回收符号）强制日期为2025年8月18日；扩展标签要求（第13条附加字段）强制日期为2026年8月18日或相关实施法规生效后18个月（以较晚者为准）。工业电池（≥2 kWh）及电动汽车电池还须附有可通过二维码访问的数字电池护照，包含生命周期、碳足迹、健康状态及供应链数据。电池护照强制日期为2027年2月18日。数据属性技术规范仍取决于截至2026-06-11尚未通过的授权法规。
summary.zht: 所有電池須貼附規定標籤（容量、化學體系、危險符號、再生料比例、QR碼）。基本標籤要求（含分類回收符號）強制日期為2025年8月18日；擴展標籤要求（第13條附加字段）強制日期為2026年8月18日或相關實施法規生效後18個月（以較晚者為準）。工業電池（≥2 kWh）及電動車電池還須附有可通過QR碼訪問的數位電池護照，包含生命週期、碳足跡、健康狀態及供應鏈數據。電池護照強制日期為2027年2月18日。數據屬性技術規範仍取決於截至2026-06-11尚未通過的授權法規。

standards_or_laws: Delegated acts on Battery Passport data attributes [UNVERIFIED — not finalised as of 2026-06-11]

summary.en: China requires product labelling per GB standards (e.g. GB/T 36276, GB 38031) covering basic safety and capacity information. No equivalent to the EU Battery Passport digital traceability system exists in Chinese regulation.
summary.zh: 中国要求按GB标准（如GB/T 36276、GB 38031）进行产品标签标注，涵盖基本安全及容量信息。中国法规中无对应欧盟电池护照数字追溯系统的要求。
summary.zht: 中國要求按GB標準（如GB/T 36276、GB 38031）進行產品標籤標注，涵蓋基本安全及容量信息。中國法規中無對應歐盟電池護照數位追溯系統的要求。

standards_or_laws: No CN Battery Passport equivalent as of 2026-06-11

gap.en: The Battery Passport is an entirely new digital compliance infrastructure requirement with no Chinese parallel. Exporters must develop or integrate with EU-recognised passport platforms, collect and maintain granular lifecycle data, and update labels to EU specifications — a significant operational and IT investment.
gap.zh: 电池护照是全新的数字合规基础设施要求，中国无对应机制。出口商须开发或接入欧盟认可的护照平台，收集并维护详细生命周期数据，并将标签更新至欧盟规格——需要大量运营及IT投入。
gap.zht: 電池護照是全新的數位合規基礎設施要求，中國無對應機制。出口商須開發或接入歐盟認可的護照平台，收集並維護詳細生命週期數據，並將標籤更新至歐盟規格——需要大量運營及IT投入。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU) — basic labelling from 18 August 2025; extended labelling from 18 August 2026; Battery Passport from 18 February 2027 (delegated acts for data attributes pending)
mandatory_status.cn: Partial — basic labelling mandatory under GB standards; no Battery Passport obligation

source.publisher: Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: High gap. Battery Passport represents a paradigm shift to digital product transparency. Chinese manufacturers must invest in data infrastructure and third-party platform integration well ahead of the 18 February 2027 mandatory date.
compliance_verdict.zh: 差距显著。电池护照代表产品透明度的范式转变。中国制造商须在2027年2月18日强制日期前提前投资数据基础设施并整合第三方平台。
compliance_verdict.zht: 差距顯著。電池護照代表產品透明度的範式轉變。中國製造商須在2027年2月18日強制日期前提前投資數據基礎設施並整合第三方平台。
